name: Shurayh ibn Abdullah
title: Pure Companion
shortDescription: A sincere Shia and loyal companion of Imam Hussain (AS) who sacrificed his life on Ashura defending Wilayah.
fullStory:
Shurayh ibn Abdullah (or Shurayh ibn Ubayd) was a loyal companion and sincere Shia from Kufa who managed to navigate through Kufa's security measures to reach Imam Hussain (AS).

Having spent his life in love and devotion to the Ahl al-Bayt (AS), he found Karbala to be the best opportunity to prove his loyalty. Shurayh settled in the Imam's camp shoulder-to-shoulder with veteran companions and Shia elders.

On Ashura, he entered the battlefield with a tranquil heart and firm faith, and did not hesitate for a moment in defending the Master of Martyrs (AS). Eventually, after a valiant fight, he was martyred by Ibn Sa'd's executioners.

His name is recorded in biographical sources as one of the Karbala martyrs and is greeted by the Imam of his time in authentic Ziyarats.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَى شُرَيْحِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ...
quote: (Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya:) Peace be upon Shurayh ibn Abdullah...
